scope: Scaffold services/runner from template with Express, health endpoint, OTel bootstrap, problem+json middleware, and validate scripts.

sources.summary: Template documentation covering scripts, env vars, and usage expectations.
Express server setup with health route, problem details, telemetry lifecycle, graceful shutdown.
RFC 9457 helpers applied to all routes, used for 404 + error handling.
OpenTelemetry bootstrap referencing SERVICE_NAME override for resource attributes.
Per-service Vitest runner shim invoked by validate:all.

planned_changes: Copy template directory into services/runner and update metadata (package name, README title, service name).
Set runner service PORT default to 3004 in .env.example and configuration.
Ensure SERVICE_NAME and logging identifiers use executor-runner-service.
Verify npm scripts include validate:all and telemetry bootstrap remains intact.
risks: Forgetting to rename package scope or SERVICE_NAME would cause telemetry collisions.
Missing validate:all script hook would break per-service pipeline expectations.
